title: Same; decree may not be executed until final
doc_html:
§4436.  Same; decree may not be executed until final

Nothing in R.S. 13:4434 through 13:4436 shall be construed to permit a writ in execution of a decree to issue until the decree is final.
doc_text:
§4436.  Same; decree may not be executed until final
Nothing in R.S. 13:4434 through 13:4436 shall be construed to permit a writ in execution of a decree to issue until the decree is final.
